title: Luci's Bits & Bobs
description: A mod that adds tonnes of blocks, so that you can have more blocks to choose from when building!
body:
## Bits & Bobs!
there are blocks and items in this mod!

### block names?
- Deluxe Wood
- Deluxe Planks
- Birch Wall

### item names?
- "The Yapper"
- Cantaloupe (please do not eat)
